In re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::util::bit_util

re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::util::bit_util

Function unset_bit_raw

pub unsafe fn unset_bit_raw(data: *mut u8, i: usize)
Expand description

Sets bit at position i for data to 0

§Safety

Note this doesn’t do any bound checking, for performance reason. The caller is responsible to guarantee that i is within bounds.
